name: Robot Mower V&V Decomposition
description: A Bayesian Belief Network decomposing the verification and validation of a robot mower. Each node is a specific, testable claim about the system's behaviour. The value represents confidence that the claim has been verified true. Child nodes compute their value from parent values using different aggregation functions (weighted average, noisy AND, noisy OR, weakest link, threshold gate).

nodes.label: IMU Calibration Valid
nodes.description: IMU accelerometer and gyroscope calibration error < 0.5° drift per hour

nodes.label: RTK-GPS Fix Achieved
nodes.description: RTK-GPS achieves fixed solution with HDOP < 1.0 within 90s of power-on

nodes.label: Blade PWM Responds in <10ms
nodes.description: Blade motor PWM duty cycle changes take effect within 10ms of command

nodes.label: E-Stop Circuit <50ms
nodes.description: Hardware emergency stop circuit interrupts blade power within 50ms

nodes.label: Watchdog Resets on Hang
nodes.description: Hardware watchdog triggers system reset if main loop stalls for >200ms

nodes.label: All RTOS Deadlines Met
nodes.description: No RTOS task misses its deadline under worst-case execution time analysis

nodes.label: Firmware CRC Verified
nodes.description: Firmware image CRC-32 is verified on every boot before execution

nodes.label: Battery SOC ±5%
nodes.description: Battery state-of-charge estimation is accurate within ±5% across full range

nodes.label: BLE Pairing Uses LESC
nodes.description: Bluetooth LE pairing uses LE Secure Connections with numeric comparison

nodes.label: OTA Signature Verified
nodes.description: OTA firmware updates are rejected unless Ed25519 signature is valid

nodes.label: Motor Current Sensed ±2%
nodes.description: Wheel and blade motor current sensing is accurate within ±2%

nodes.label: Ultrasonic Range ±3cm
nodes.description: Ultrasonic distance sensors are accurate within ±3cm at 0.2–3m range

nodes.label: Tilt Sensor Triggers >15°
nodes.description: Tilt/lift sensor reliably triggers blade stop when chassis tilts beyond 15°

nodes.label: Rain Sensor Detects 1mm/hr
nodes.description: Rain sensor detects rainfall rates as low as 1mm/hr and triggers return-to-dock

nodes.label: Charging CC/CV Profile Correct
nodes.description: Battery charging follows correct constant-current/constant-voltage profile per cell spec

nodes.label: Position Accuracy <2cm
nodes.description: Fused GPS+IMU+odometry position estimate is within 2cm of ground truth

nodes.label: Heading Accuracy <1°
nodes.description: Heading estimate from IMU+GPS fusion is within 1° of true heading

nodes.label: Blade Stops Within 1s
nodes.description: Blade motor reaches zero RPM within 1 second of stop command

nodes.label: Blade Speed ±50 RPM
nodes.description: Blade motor maintains target RPM within ±50 RPM under varying grass load

nodes.label: Obstacle Detected at 30cm
nodes.description: Static obstacles >10cm height are detected at minimum 30cm distance

nodes.label: Moving Object Detected 50cm
nodes.description: Moving objects (pets, children) detected at minimum 50cm distance

nodes.label: Lift Stops Blade <200ms
nodes.description: Blade motor power is cut within 200ms of mower being lifted

nodes.label: Stays Within Boundary ±5cm
nodes.description: Mower does not cross virtual boundary by more than 5cm

nodes.label: Returns to Dock Successfully
nodes.description: Mower navigates to charging dock and aligns with contacts within 3 attempts

nodes.label: Straight Line ±3cm
nodes.description: Mower tracks a straight mowing line with lateral deviation <3cm

nodes.label: Turn Accuracy ±5°
nodes.description: Mower executes point turns within ±5° of commanded angle

nodes.label: Returns at 15% SOC
nodes.description: Mower interrupts mowing and returns to dock when SOC drops to 15%

nodes.label: Rain Triggers Dock Return
nodes.description: Mower returns to dock within 60s of rain sensor activation

nodes.label: OTA Rollback on Failure
nodes.description: Failed OTA update automatically rolls back to previous firmware within 30s

nodes.label: App Connects via BLE <10s
nodes.description: Mobile app establishes authenticated BLE connection within 10 seconds

nodes.label: Watchdog Recovery <5s
nodes.description: System recovers from watchdog reset and resumes safe state within 5 seconds

nodes.label: Full Charge in <90min
nodes.description: Battery charges from 15% to 100% within 90 minutes on dock

function.display: Noisy AND (all parents must be strong)

nodes.label: Motor Stall Detected <500ms
nodes.description: Wheel or blade motor stall condition is detected within 500ms

nodes.label: Holds on 25° Slope
nodes.description: Mower maintains position on 25° slope without sliding when stationary

nodes.label: Diag Log Upload <30s
nodes.description: Diagnostic log is uploaded to cloud within 30 seconds of WiFi connection

nodes.label: Mows Rectangle Evenly
nodes.description: 100m² rectangular lawn mowed with <5% uncut area in single session

nodes.label: Mows L-Shaped Garden
nodes.description: L-shaped garden with passage correctly mowed including zone transition

nodes.label: Avoids Garden Furniture
nodes.description: Mower navigates around static garden furniture without contact

nodes.label: Stops for Approaching Child
nodes.description: Blade stops and mower halts when child approaches within 50cm

nodes.label: Stops for Pet
nodes.description: Blade stops when cat/dog enters detection zone while mowing

nodes.description: Mower mows up and down 15° slope maintaining straight lines and blade height

nodes.label: Handles Rain Mid-Mow
nodes.description: Mower safely returns to dock when rain begins during mowing session

nodes.label: Completes Full Mow Cycle
nodes.description: Undock → mow entire area → return → dock in single session on full battery
